info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' GawwayedGawwate dve stAM calane RO Sapi ca kramAt ' (Slo.73) - devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'anyonyamiSritEH SastrErAkASaM saYjaGawwire baBaYjuScicCiduScEva tayorbARAH sahasraSaH' (rA॰6.68.30) saYjaGawwire=cAlayAmAsuH saYjaGfzuH sampipizuH
'nyavartata tataH karRaH saNGawwita ivoragaH' (BA॰droRa॰188.11) saNGawwitaH pratihataH
'sUryasya viviDavarRAH pavanena viGawwitAH karAH sABre viyati DanuHsaMsTAnA ye dfSyante tad indraDanuH' (va0 bf0 saM0 341) ukto'rTaH
'hezitaM hyupaSfRvAne droRe sarvaM viGawwitam' (BA0 41494) sarvaM rahasyamudBinnamityAha
'tava sA kaTAsu pariGawwayati SravaRaM yadaNga limuKena muhuH' (SiSu0 964) pariGawwayati sPAlayati
